name: AgentFlow AI — Multi-Agent Platform
desc: A production-ready AI agent system built with LangGraph and FastAPI. Features intent routing, tool-calling agents, multi-step reasoning, and a premium React chat interface. Demonstrates real agentic workflows.

name: PDF Question-Answer Bot (RAG)
desc: An AI chatbot powered by Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Upload any PDF and ask natural language questions. Built with LangChain, vector embeddings, and OpenAI API for accurate document Q&A.

name: AI Writing Assistant
desc: An intelligent writing tool powered by LLM APIs. Supports content generation, rewriting, tone adjustment, and prompt-based editing. Built for content creators, marketers, and startup teams.

name: AI Customer Support Assistant
desc: An automated customer support chatbot built with LangChain and function calling. Routes queries intelligently, answers FAQs, and escalates to human agents when needed. Designed for SaaS and e-commerce.

name: Weather Dashboard
desc: A responsive weather application built with modern frontend technologies. Fetches real-time weather data via public APIs and displays forecasts with a clean, professional UI.

name: Payment-Gated Job Platform
desc: A mobile commerce platform featuring bundle display, M-Pesa payment simulation, and WhatsApp integration. Built to demonstrate realistic UX flows for digital payment-gated services.
